call.lobby.send_link_hint: Send the link to the person you want to call, then join.
call.lobby.invited: You've been invited to a video call.
call.lobby.permission_hint: Allow camera and microphone access when prompted.
call.lobby.error.media_blocked: Camera or microphone access was blocked. Allow access in your browser and try again.
call.lobby.error.generic: Could not join the call. Please try again.
home.title: HangVidU
home.description: Instant messaging, peer-to-peer video calls, and media sharing.
contact.add.title: Add Contacts
contact.add.login_required: Please sign in to add contacts
contact.add.not_found_emailing: Not on HangVidU yet — opening email to invite
contact.add.lookup_error: Couldn't verify this email right now. Try again.
contact.import.no_email: No contacts with email addresses found.
contact.disclosure.import: Uses Google Contacts to import your contacts and show which ones are already on HangVidU.
contact.disclosure.gmail_send: Uses Gmail permission to send the invite emails you select from your Gmail account. HangVidU does not read your inbox.
contact.invite.failed_detail:
Failed to send emails: {error}

Please try again or use your email client.
contact.invite.share.copy_failed: Couldn't share or copy invite link.
contact.invite.share.label: Share invite link
contact.invite.copy.label: Copy link
contact.invite.subject: Join me on HangVidU!
contact.invite.body:
Hi!

{name} invited you to join HangVidU - an app for text messaging, video calls and video sharing.

Click here to get started:
{link}

See you there!
contact.name.edit: Enter new name for this contact:
notification.enable.title: Enable Notifications
notification.enable.body: Get notified when someone calls you, even when the app is closed.
notification.enable.blocked.chrome: Notifications blocked. Click the icon in the address bar to allow.
notification.enable.blocked.firefox: Notifications blocked. Click the lock icon in the address bar, then Permissions.
notification.enable.silent_block: Notifications were automatically blocked by {browser}. Open site settings in the address bar to allow.
notification.enable.failed_push_setup: Notifications allowed, but push setup failed.
notification.enable.timeout: Notification permission did not complete. Check the browser prompt or try again.
notification.missed.title: Missed Call
notification.invite.title: Contact Invitation
notification.push.unsupported.title: Push notifications unavailable
notification.push.unsupported.body:
Your browser doesn't support push notifications.
To receive call alerts when the app isn't focused, install via Chrome, Edge, or Firefox.
notification.referral.title: You've been invited
notification.referral.sign_in_prompt: Sign in to add them as a contact
notification.update.title: Update available
auth.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.error.invalid_credentials: We couldn't find an account with those credentials.
auth.error.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.error.username_invalid: Username must be 3-20 characters using a-z, 0-9, or underscore.
auth.ios_blocked:
Sign-in is blocked in the installed app on iOS.

Tap the Login button again to open in Safari and complete sign-in.
auth.popup_blocked: Pop-up blocked. Please enable pop-ups for this site in your browser settings, or try signing in from a desktop browser.
auth.account_exists: An account already exists with the same email but different sign-in credentials.
referral.sign_in_banner: Tap here to sign in and connect with your inviter
referral.sign_in_named: {name} invited you — tap here to sign in and connect
